migrations.upgrade_result: Upgraded from 033 to 048 (15 migrations). Required manual intervention: migration 039 (data_lineage table pre-existed, stamped), migration 042 (text_encrypted column pre-existed, stamped), migration 045 (experiment enums conflicted with model metadata auto-creation, tables created via raw SQL then stamped). Migrations 046-048 ran cleanly.
issues_found: Migration 039: data_lineage table already existed outside migrations - stamped past
Migration 042: text_encrypted column on documents already existed - stamped past

Migration 045: SQLAlchemy model metadata auto-creates experiment_status enum during create_table, conflicting with explicit CREATE TYPE in migration. Fixed by creating tables via raw SQL and stamping.

tables.note: patients table does not exist - project uses OMOP 'person' table instead. patient_site_assignments table exists for site-level assignments.
